## Summary

-

## Parity

- Parity Status: web+android complete
- Parity Ticket: #issue-or-link (if parity is deferred)

## Testing

- [ ] Web tested
- [ ] Android tested
- [ ] Accessibility checks completed

## Compliance

- [ ] Privacy/security impact reviewed
- [ ] No sensitive data exposed in logs/telemetry

## Modularity Governance

- [ ] Changed files respect responsibility boundaries (rendering, state/effects, data-fetching, utilities, styles)
- [ ] Complexity gates pass (cyclomatic <= 10, max lines per function <= 200 where applicable)
- [ ] If tightly-coupled private helpers remain in-file, PR includes a short justification
